summary.summary: Updated fastlane/Fastfile to add the USERNOTIFICATIONS_TIMESENSITIVE bundle ID capability to the list of capabilities passed to Spaceship::ConnectAPI::BundleIdCapability::Type (added Spaceship::ConnectAPI::BundleIdCapability::Type::USERNOTIFICATIONS_TIMESENSITIVE alongside PUSH_NOTIFICATIONS). The file change is in fastlane/Fastfile and includes a newline addition at EOF. (sources: diff:c531eb047d0b, file:5cc45370d31b, commit:1fe78c02d291)
summary.userFacingImpact: No direct runtime behavior changes to the app are shown in this commit; the change modifies the Fastfile (build/provisioning configuration) to include the USERNOTIFICATIONS_TIMESENSITIVE capability for bundle IDs, which affects provisioning/capability registration rather than app code. Evidence is limited to the Fastfile modification; human review is not required based on the provided diff. (sources: diff:c531eb047d0b, file:5cc45370d31b, commit:1fe78c02d291)
